strengths: 20 years of software engineering across web, mobile, and infrastructure—exceeds experience minimum by 5 years
Current Staff Engineer at re:cinq with direct involvement in AI infrastructure and MCP framework development
Demonstrated IC leadership through founding GISCollective, mentoring via workshops, and multiple staff/senior roles
concerns: Only 6 months in AI infrastructure role; no prior ML/AI background or formal AI training evident
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners on cloud-AI adoption—a core job responsibility
No shipped AI-powered products or platforms with market recognition, which is an explicitly preferred qualification

key_factors.factor: Missing strategic customer advisory track record
No proven AI product expertise prior to recent role
Strong IC leadership foundation at staff level

response.justification: Candidate has solid foundational engineering credentials and 20 years of experience meeting the minimum requirement, with demonstrated IC leadership. However, the role requires someone who can strategically advise on cutting-edge AI adoption. Candidate's recent 6-month pivot to AI infrastructure suggests potential, but lacks the deep AI expertise, customer-advisory experience, and shipped AI products the position demands. Better suited for a hands-on AI engineering role than a director-level AI strategy advisor position.
